title: Canadian Securities Litigation Landscape: A Conversation with Naizam Kanji, General Counsel of the OSC
content:
## Canadian Securities Litigation Landscape: A Conversation with Naizam Kanji, General Counsel of the OSC
McCarthy Tétrault is pleased to invite you to join us for our Canadian Securities Litigation Landscape Fireside Chat with Naizam Kanji , General Counsel of the Ontario Securities Commission. In this session, Wendy Berman , head of McCarthy Tétrault’s National Securities Litigation Group, will sit down with Naizam to discuss key issues impacting Canadian capital markets and emerging issues in the securities regulatory environment, including:
- Role of securities regulators in the evolving shareholder activism landscape
- Enforcement trends and challenges, including whistleblowers and efforts to combat greenwashing risks
- Regulatory initiatives for addressing related party transaction risks
Thank you for accepting or declining this invitation before Wednesday, April 3 .
For more information regarding this event, please email clientevents@mccarthy.ca .
This program is eligible for up to 1 Substantive Hour under the Law Society of Ontario’s mandatory CPD Regime.
4:00 - 4:30 p.m. - Registration 4:30 - 5:30 p.m. - Fireside Chat & Q&A 5:30 - 7:00 p.m. - Networking Reception
- Law Society of Ontario – Substantive
